description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is primarily white with large, rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, allowing for ample natural light. The house features a prominent front staircase leading up to a raised entryway, which is complemented by a driveway and a garage on the lower level. There is a visible balcony or terrace area with a railing, and the upper floor includes open-plan living spaces with wood flooring. The property includes a driveway with a parked car and landscaped green patches near the entrance. The overall design emphasizes minimalism, functionality, and open interior spaces.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, large asymmetrical windows, and a raised entryway accessed by a prominent staircase. The exterior is white with wood accents and features a driveway, garage, and balcony.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main staircase, driveway, garage, and entryway, with a car parked and balcony visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, large windows, and the terrace area with railing; the driveway extends to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a mostly solid white facade with multiple windows in an asymmetrical arrangement and large glass doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage entrance, driveway, and additional windows, with the staircase leading up to the main entry.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is raised, accessed by a wide staircase, with a simple door and no porch; features a balcony above and minimal decorative elements.
